meaning: adj.(奥地利裔美籍经济学家)熊彼特的 n.熊彼特经济学说主张者
examples: It is threatened by the Schumpeterian forces of creative destruction.
The world is not black and white like what the Keynesian or Schumpeterian theory suggests.
The recession raises questions that go to the heart of the ideological division between the parties: should you resort to Keynesian stimulus or Schumpeterian creative destruction?
How much of the consumer surplus generated by innovation ends up as Schumpeterian profits?
There is much to celebrate in this achievement that perhaps we can call the Schumpeterian effect of Indian IT.
